title: Close-out: prose canonical form, stale header comments, full verify
action: Per DB5: update the Helper CLI Quick Reference (routing-and-contracts.md) to present 'node .bee/bin/bee.mjs <group> <verb>' as canonical with a note that bee_*.mjs shims remain valid; refresh bee.mjs usage header to list all 9 groups; fix command-registry.mjs's stale header comment (it still describes the spawnSync delegation idea and '4 existing helpers' — now inaccurate twice over). Run the full verify battery and confirm every suite green.

no live prose still calls the dispatcher '4 helpers only'
prohibitions: no code behavior changes in this cell
